title: Significance of small businesses
summary: 9609 AS — role of SMEs in employment, innovation, and local economies.
learningObjectives: Explain economic and social roles of SMEs.
Analyse strengths and weaknesses vs large firms.
Evaluate government support for small businesses.

simpleExplanation.title: Small but vital
simpleExplanation.summary: SMEs create jobs, serve niches, and drive local innovation but may lack economies of scale and finance.

sections.content: **Small businesses** (1.3.2) contrasts with **corporate growth** (1.3.3). Balance **advantages to economy** with **challenges to the firm**.
